title: HoloLens 2 fundamentals: develop mixed reality applications
summary: Learn about the best practices for developing Azure-enabled mixed reality applications with the Mixed Reality Toolkit.

sections.title: HoloLens 2 fundamentals: develop mixed reality applications
sections.summary: Learn about the best practices for developing Azure-enabled mixed reality applications with the Mixed Reality Toolkit.

lessons.title: Introduction to the Mixed Reality Toolkit-Set Up Your Project and Use Hand Interaction
lessons.content_md:
This course provides the user with a basic understanding of all the foundational elements of MRTK.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/learn-mrtk-tutorials/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to the Mixed Reality Toolkit-Set Up Your Project and Use Hand Interaction

lessons.title: Place a Mars Rover object in the scene and work with grids and intelligent object tracking
lessons.content_md:
This course provides you with an understanding of placing objects and tracking objects using solvers.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/place-scene-objects/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Place a Mars Rover object in the scene and work with grids and intelligent object tracking

lessons.title: Getting started with 3D object interaction
lessons.content_md:
This course will provide steps and procedures to follow on how to manipulate and interact with 3D objects.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/get-started-with-object-interaction/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Enable eye tracking and voice commands for objects on the HoloLens 2
lessons.content_md:
This course provides the user an overall understanding on how to use eye tracking and voice commands

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/use-eye-tracking-voice-commands/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Enable eye tracking and voice commands for objects on the HoloLens 2

lessons.title: Add Azure AI services to your mixed reality project
lessons.content_md:
This course explores the use of Azure speech services by integrating to a hololens2 application. You can also deploy your project to a HoloLens.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-speech-services-tutorials-mrtk/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Add Azure AI services to your mixed reality project

lessons.title: Activate spatial audio for your HoloLens 2 application
lessons.content_md:
Activate spatial audio for your HoloLens 2 application

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/spatial-audio-tutorials-mrtk/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Activate spatial audio for your HoloLens 2 application

lessons.title: Integrate Azure Cloud Services to your Unity project on HoloLens 2
lessons.content_md:
Add Azure Cloud Services such as Azure Storage and Azure Custom Vision for your mixed reality application.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-cloud-services-tutorials/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Integrate Azure Cloud Services to your Unity project on HoloLens 2

lessons.title: Create a Holographic Remoting app to visualize 3D content on HoloLens 2
lessons.content_md:
This course explores the use of PC holographic remoting by integrating to a HoloLens 2 application.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/pc-holographic-remoting-tutorials/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create a Holographic Remoting app to visualize 3D content on HoloLens 2

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica HoloLens 2 fundamentals: develop mixed reality applications
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **HoloLens 2 fundamentals: develop mixed reality applications**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
